sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Roma have shown decent form in their last 5 matches, securing 3 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss, with a strong defensive display (conceding only 3 goals). Milan have also performed well, winning 4 of their last 5 matches, scoring consistently but struggling to keep clean sheets (conceding in 3 of 5 games).

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two encounters between Roma and Milan, the results were split with Milan winning 3-1 at home and a 1-1 draw in the other match. Both games saw goals from both teams, indicating a high likelihood of both sides scoring.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Roma (6th, 63 points) have a solid defense, conceding only 34 goals (4th best in the league), while Milan (8th, 60 points) have a potent attack with 58 goals scored. Roma's home form and Milan's missing key defenders like Theo Hernández could tilt the balance slightly in Roma's favor.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: Roma's Matías Soulé (7.48 rating, 2 goals, 2 assists in last 5) and Milan's Santiago Giménez (7.275 rating, 3 goals in last 5) are in form and could decide the game. Roma's Paulo Dybala also has a strong record against Milan.
